zh.lifeSummary: 當John Parker Jr.於1601年4月20日之前出生在英國戴文格奧智哈姆時，他的父親John Parker Sr.33歲，母親Katherine Dennis21歲。他於1622年11月16日與Mary Crocombe在英國戴文格奧智哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1661年5月7日在美國緬因州薩加達可格奧智托，埋葬在美國緬因州薩加達可格奧智托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Parker Jr.于1601年4月20日之前出生在英国戴文格奧智哈姆时，他的父亲John Parker Sr.33岁，母亲Katherine Dennis21岁。他于1622年11月16日与Mary Crocombe在英国戴文格奧智哈姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1661年5月7日在美国缅因州薩加達可格奧智托，埋葬在美国缅因州薩加達可格奧智托。

nameMeanings.name: Parker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English parker ‘park-keeper’ (Old French parquier, parchier), an officer employed to look after deer and other game in a hunting park (see Park 1). This surname is also very common among African Americans. It has also been recorded since medieval times in Ireland.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish names.

variants.name: Parkman
meanings: occupational name from Middle English park ‘enclosure, game preserve, park’ (Old French parc) + man, sometimes for one living at or near such a place but probably more often denoting someone employed to look after after deer and other game in a hunting park; compare Parker .
occupational name denoting the servant (Middle English man) of someone called Park (see Park 2).

variants.name: Parkerson
meanings: English: from the occupational name Parker + patronymic -son.

variants.name: Parkey
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): dialect pronunciation of Parker . Parker has a long history in Macclesfield, Manchester, and Bridgnorth.

variants.name: Park
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Young, Sang, Sung, Yong, Jung, Jong, Chan, Jae, Jin, Kwang, Kyung, Myung, Chong, Chang, Chung, Byung, Min, Moon, Chul, Hae, Jeong, Dae, Seong, Myong.

English and Scottish: from Middle English and Older Scots parc, parke, perk ‘park, enclosure’ (Old French parc), often referring to the grounds of a manor house or a deer park where the lord hunted. The name was probably synonymous with Parker , denoting an officer who looked after a park for the lord of the manor.
English and Scottish: from a medieval pet form of the personal name   Peter  . Compare   Parkin  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Parker Jr. was born before 20 April 1601, in Georgeham, Devon, England, his father, John Parker Sr., was 33 and his mother, Katherine Dennis, was 21. He married Mary Crocombe on 16 November 1622, in Georgeham, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 7 May 1661, in Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, United States, and was buried in Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Parker Jr. est né avant 20 avril 1601, à Georgeham, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Parker Sr., avait 33 ans et sa mère, Katherine Dennis, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mary Crocombe le 16 novembre 1622, à Georgeham, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 7 mai 1661, à Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, États-Unis, et a été enterré à Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, États-Unis.

November 1622 in Georgeham, Devon, England Mary Crocombe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. Mai 1661 in Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Georgetown, Sagadahoc, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

Lui sposato Mary Crocombe il 16 novembre 1622, nel Georgeham, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: John Parker Jr.が1601年4月20日以前にイギリスデボンジョージェハムで生まれた時，父John Parker Sr.は33歳，母Katherine Dennisは21歳であった。1622年11月16日にイギリスデボンジョージェハムでMary Crocombeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1661年5月7日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州サゲアダホックジョージェトウンで死去し，アメリカ合衆国メイン州サゲアダホックジョージェトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Parker Jr.(이)가 1601년 4월 20일 이전 영국 데폰 조그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Parker Sr.(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Dennis(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1622년 11월 16일 영국 데폰 조그함에서 Mary Crocombe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1661년 5월 7일 미국 메인 주 사가다호크 조짓운에서 사망했으며 미국 메인 주 사가다호크 조짓운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Parker Jr. nasceu antes 20 de abril de 1601, em Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Parker Sr., tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Dennis, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Crocombe em 16 de novembro de 1622, em Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Parker Jr. родился перед 20 апрель 1601 г. в местности джеоргэам, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Parker Sr. было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Dennis, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Crocombe 16 ноября 1622 г. в местности джеоргэам, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 7 мая 1661 г. в местности джеоргетоун, сагадахок, Мэн, Соединенные штаты и был похоронен в местности джеоргетоун, сагадахок, Мэн, Соединенные штаты.
